name: marshal
description: Marshal control-plane Codex hooks: squad continuation and live platoon status.

interface.longDescription: Marshal owns Codex's UserPromptSubmit, Stop, and SubagentStop hooks so the platoon/squad control-plane is the entry point: it injects live squad status and keeps Codex working an active squad until the stage is done. Codex, OMO, and LazyCodex are execution substrates Marshal directs.
defaultPrompt: Show the current Marshal squad status.
